positive: A stylized geometric portrait of a golden retriever howling at a stylized crescent moon, integrated with constellations and abstract cosmic dust. The dog should be rendered in a clean silhouette style, filled with vibrant cosmic patterns (neons, deep blues, gold flecks). Use a limited color palette of sapphire blue, mustard yellow, gold leaf accents, and deep black. Composition must be central, symmetrical, and suitable for a t-shirt print. The background should feature abstract, flowing celestial ribbons connecting the dog and the moon. Art style: Art Deco meets modern vector illustration, highly detailed, high contrast, flat graphic design.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, monochrome, poor quality, cartoon, realism
